title: FAST.R Installation and Launch with RStudio
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"11or6","text":"Step -by-step protocol to setup the R shiny application FAST.R for data analysis and visualization of FAST-generated data. This protocol is meant to be used within the FAST workflow","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":168,"length":13}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"F0F5B38F68284DB3930CD1D45D6E1AA9","url":"https://www.protocols.io/private/6CA6F490963011EEB6B30A58A9FEAC02"}}}}
steps: If familiar with R and RStudio , see the FAST.R package page for installation and use. If NOT familiar with R and RStudio , read instructions below
Download and install R and RStudio Download from here . Note that R version 4.3.2 or higher is required.
Download the files below by clicking on each link; then click the "Download raw file" button Install FASTR Run FASTR Download button (zoomed out) Download button (zoomed in)
If you get the message "These packages have more recent versions available", choose update all click in the Console > type "1" > press Enter
Once FAST-R opens, simply follow the instructions provided directly in the app to perform data analysis and/or generate graphs
If you have never used FAST.R via RStudio before, follow Steps 2-3. Otherwise, skip to Step 4 FAST.R setup
creator: Francesco Neri
